title: Astrum Sky Overlay
description: A mesmerizing sky overlay depicting an animated night sky
body:
![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/732fd2e847b683b9b4e160f560464ee2537d9ad5.png)
### What is this resource pack?
This resource pack is an overlay which replaces the default minecraft sky with a different sky.

---

### Requirements
- Needs Optifine
- Custom Sky should be turned on
- Stars / Sun and Moon should be turned on

---

### How to use this resource pack?
This is compatible with all other resource packs, just make sure you put it on top of the one you are already using.
